## ERT1.1. Horizontal en route flight efficiency of the actual trajectory (KEA) (KPI#1)

Belgium has been improving both in terms of KEA and corrected KEA to consider the influence of war in Ukraine. The values for KEA are 3.59% in 2023, 3.48% in 2024 and 3.35% in 2025. For the corrected KEA the values are 3.51% in 2023, 3.39% in 2024 and 3.25% in 2025.

These values place Belgium as 18^th^ for KEA and 24^th^ for corrected KEA in 2025.

Belgium contributes 2.13% of the total additional distance in the SES area, 18^th^.
